requirement: All LMT batteries with capacity > 2 kWh must have a digital battery passport
gap: e-Scooter Pro uses an LMT battery (48V, 2.5 kWh) but currently ships without a battery passport system
recommended_action: Implement digital battery passport with QR code linking to database containing manufacturing data, carbon footprint, and supply chain information per Annex XIII

alert.message: URGENT: e-Scooter Pro (P013-A) requires battery passport by 2027-02-18. LMT battery (2.5 kWh) must have digital passport per EU Reg 2023/1542 Art. 77. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R1542
